name: Terraform Infrastructure Deployment
description: Plan, validate, and apply Terraform configurations with state management, drift detection, and approval gates.

inputs.name: terraform_config
inputs.description: Terraform module paths, provider configurations, and variable definitions.

inputs.name: target_environment
inputs.description: Deployment environment (dev, staging, production) and associated backend configuration.

inputs.name: approval_policy
inputs.description: Approval requirements for plan review and apply authorization.

inputs.name: drift_baseline
inputs.description: Known-good state snapshot for drift comparison.

outputs.name: plan_output
outputs.description: Terraform plan with resource changes, additions, and destructions.

outputs.name: apply_result
outputs.description: Applied infrastructure state with resource IDs and outputs.

outputs.name: drift_report
outputs.description: Comparison of actual state versus expected configuration.

outputs.name: state_backup
outputs.description: Pre-apply state snapshot for rollback capability.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is Terraform-based infrastructure deployment, not application release or config management.
Require a successful terraform validate and plan review before any apply operation.
Verify applied resources match the approved plan and no unexpected destructions occurred.

gates.description: Return plan output, apply results, drift report, and state backup reference.

steps.description: Run terraform validate and terraform fmt to ensure configuration correctness and style compliance.
Compare current infrastructure state against the drift baseline to identify out-of-band changes.
Execute terraform plan with detailed output, capturing additions, changes, and destructions.
Review plan for security implications, cost impact, and compliance with approval policy.
Snapshot the current Terraform state before applying changes for rollback capability.
Execute terraform apply with the approved plan, monitoring for errors and unexpected changes.
Validate deployed resources are healthy, accessible, and match expected outputs.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read Terraform modules, variable files, and state configurations.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write plan outputs, state backups, and deployment reports.

tools.name: shell.exec
tools.purpose: Execute terraform init, validate, plan, apply, and output commands.

verification.method: Plan output reviewed and approved per approval_policy.
Apply output contains zero resource destructions unless explicitly approved.
All deployed resources pass health checks within 5 minutes of apply.
Post-apply terraform plan shows zero changes (clean state).

success_criteria: Terraform configuration validates and plans successfully.
Plan is reviewed and approved per policy before apply.
All resources are deployed and healthy with clean state.
State backup exists and rollback procedure is documented.

rollback.when: If apply fails or produces unexpected changes, restore from state backup and re-plan.
